description: Intel Core i9 14900F 14th Gen Processor What is Intel Core i9 14900F 14th Gen Processor price in Pakistan? Intel Core i9 14900F 14th Gen Processor price in Pakistan is Rs.121,000. This high-performance CPU features 24 cores (8 Performance + 16 Efficient) and 32 threads with boost clock speeds up to 5.8 GHz, delivering excellent performance for gaming and multitasking without integrated graphics.
